title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Law as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: She is barely clinging to life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Please save her, I implore you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: bear with it a little longer, Kiku!! Help is on the way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still can't believe it... I survived being severed in two!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I suppose law-dono did not completely REATTACH MY BODY BEFORE.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a miracle!! Now please let Kiku be spared...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: #zzzt* Answer me, Kanjuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that...that is Orochi's voice!! But he was beheaded?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He seems unaware of... Kanjuro's demise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I am here... Crochi- Sama...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Sounds like you're at the brink, Kanjuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes...the finale...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I see... I have nothing but praise! Your perform- once was masterful!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huff... Kuff... that is flattering to hear!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can you hear it? The Cheers you earned....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...For me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed ... unfortunately, the bitterness and resentment rippling through me means I cannot fully appreciate it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our ancestors remain unsatisfied... give them a stupendous encore, Kanjuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Use your painting to depict the burning wrath of the Kurozumi clan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who cares who wins?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let them all be consumed by the Kurozumi clan's vengeance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Cast all the straggggggggggggglers in the castle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...into the abyss of hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Drag them as low as our brethren, trapped in their graves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Free their souls, Kanjuro... free us in a final blaze of glory!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: As you wish...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Please enjoy... my final show...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The suicide pact of the Kurozumi clan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: futurer

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AYA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't touch it! You'll be Roasted!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "Kazenbo!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the hell is this monster?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Emergency reports coming in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Here we go!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A gigantic unidentified spectre has appeared on the second floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All I can do is make...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...as many tiny flame clouds as I can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's going right through walls....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: PANT.... PAINT....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's like some kind of ghost!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The castle is being choked by flames!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
